status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
notes: See also registry/entity/in/gov/meity.json (the ministry itself) and registry/regulation/in/gov/meity.json (laws/rules) for other type-specific files under this namespace.

data.notes: Jointly run by MeitY, the National e-Governance Division (NeGD), and NASSCOM; portal launched March 7, 2024. Umbrella national AI program covering compute access, datasets platform, indigenous foundation models, startup funding, safe/trusted AI, and AI skilling.

match_nodes.description: GI Cloud (MeghRaj) — government cloud service provider empanelment

data.official_name: GI Cloud (MeghRaj) empanelment of Cloud Service Providers
data.notes: Assessed via STQC (Standardisation Testing and Quality Certification Directorate). Requires India-hosted/India-resident data and compliance with ISO 27001/27017/27018/20000. A procurement gate for government departments, PSUs, and financial institutions — analogous in role to FedRAMP (US) or ISMAP (Japan).
